svg.title: Decentralized Blood Donation App Architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: Frontend (React), Backend (Node.js + Smart Contracts), and Blockchain/Database layer

g.text: What the user sees and interacts with

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build the donor registration page in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the blood request page in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the donation history page?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect MetaMask wallet to React?')

g.text: Business logic, APIs, and on-chain rules

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I write a REST API for blood donation with Node.js and Express?')
sendPrompt('Write a Solidity smart contract for blood donation registration')
sendPrompt('How does IPFS work for storing medical data?')
sendPrompt('How do I use ethers.js to interact with smart contracts from Node.js?')

g.text: Where data lives permanently and securely

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy a smart contract to Polygon testnet?')
sendPrompt('What is MongoDB used for in a blockchain app?')
sendPrompt('How does MetaMask wallet work with blockchain?')
sendPrompt('What is Hardhat and how do I set it up?')

svg.text: Frontend: React.js, ethers.js, MetaMask, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Hardhat, Solidity, IPFS
